question:
How satisfied are you with the following?

The way the local authorities are solving the region’s affairs

Please tell us if you strongly agree, agree, disagree, or strongly disagree with the following statements:

A man who cannot father children is not a real man

If a man has a girlfriend or wife, he should know where she is all the time

Opposition candidates are prevented from running

The [Shanghai Cooperation Organization]

When a mother works for pay, the children suffer
Suppose you could choose between working for different kinds of companies, which one would you prefer?

How frequently do the following things occur in your neighborhood?:

Street violence and fights

The way democracy is developing in our country

A woman should tolerate violence to keep the family together

For a man to beat his wife

On the whole, women are less corrupt than men

Journalists provide fair coverage of elections

Hell

World

The quality of housing
